memoryArtifacts.headline: Agnes Baber
memoryArtifacts.description: When Agnes Barber was born in 1480 in Marston Magna, Somerset, England, her father, John, was 20, and her mother, Ms. Unknown, was 18. She married John Buckler in 1500. They had six children in 15 yea …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Barber於1480年出生在英國薩默塞特時，她的父親Sir Nicholas Barber20歲，母親Lady Catherine de Thiesselin20歲。她於大約1500年與John Buckler II在英國英格蘭多瑟特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1540年在英國英格蘭多瑟特拉迪朋爾享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Barber于1480年出生在英国薩默塞特时，她的父亲Sir Nicholas Barber20岁，母亲Lady Catherine de Thiesselin20岁。她于大约1500年与John Buckler II在英国英格兰多瑟特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1540年在英国英格兰多瑟特拉迪朋爾享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Barber
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a barber, from Middle English barb(o)ur ‘barber’ (Anglo-Norman French barber, Old French barbier, from Late Latin barbarius, a derivative of barba ‘beard’). In the Middle Ages barbers not only cut hair and shaved beards, but also practised surgery and pulled teeth.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name from German Barbier ‘barber’ (compare 1 above).
Catalan: occupational name for a barber, barber (see 1 above).

variants.name: Barbier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Dominique, Emile, Pierre, Alexandre, Gilles, Jacques, Laurent, Laurette, Manon, Marcel, Marcellin, Michel.
French: occupational name for a barber-surgeon (see Barber ), Old French barbier (from Late Latin barbarius, a derivative of barba ‘beard’). Compare Barbe and Barbee .
German: occupational name for a barber, from Middle High German barbierer, or an occupational name for an armorer, from barbier(e) ‘metal visor (to protect the face)’.

variants.name: Berber
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Salvador, Guillermo, Juan, Manuel, Francisco, Luis, Adriana, Alfredo, Angelina, Armando, Carlos.
Catalan: probably a variant of   Barber  . This surname is most common in Mexico.
Turkish: occupational name from berber ‘barber’.

variants.name: Barbero
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Ricardo, Alvino, Ana, Angel, Arsenio, Fernando, Gustavo, Jaime, Jose, Maribel, Mario, Nenita.  Italian Aldo, Angelo, Domenic, Ernani, Giulio, Italo.  French Emile, Yves.

Spanish and Italian (Piedmont): occupational name for a barber-surgeon, barbero, from Late Latin barbarius, a derivative of barba ‘beard’ (from Latin barba); see also Barber . This surname is also found in southern France.

variants.name: Barbieri
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Salvatore, Angelo, Vito, Rocco, Aldo, Cosmo, Dino, Domenic, Geno, Giovanna, Guido.
Italian: occupational name from barbiere ‘barber-surgeon’ (see Barber ), from Late Latin barbarius, a derivative of barba ‘beard’.

variants.name: Barbour
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: occupational name from Old French barbeor ‘barber’. Compare the English form Barber .

History: George Barbour sailed from England on the Transport in 1635. He became a freeman of Dedham, MA, in 1647 and settled eventually at Medfield. A Scottish merchant named Barbour settled in eastern VA in the latter half of the 17th century.

variants.name: Borbely
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Zoltan, Antal, Ferenc, Ildiko, Kalman, Laszlo, Miklos.
Hungarian (Borbély): occupational name for a barber, Hungarian borbély. See also Barber .

variants.name: Barbeau
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Pierre, Monique, Alcide, Alphonse, Amiee, Armand, Gisele, Jean Francois, Lucien, Lucienne, Michel.
French:

from barbeau ‘barbel’, a type of fish, hence a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, or a nickname for a man with a sparse beard, the fish being distinguished by beardlike growths on either side of its mouth.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Barber was born in 1480, in Somerset, England, her father, Sir Nicholas Barber, was 20 and her mother, Lady Catherine de Thiesselin, was 20. She married John Buckler II about 1500, in Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1540, in Radipole, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Barber est née en 1480, à Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir Nicholas Barber, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Lady Catherine de Thiesselin, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé John Buckler II environ 1500, à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1540, à Radipole, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Barber 1480 in Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Nicholas Barber 20 und ihre Mutter Lady Catherine de Thiesselin 20. Sie hat um 1500 in Dorset, England, United Kingdom John Buckler II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1540 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Radipole, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Barber è nata il nel 1480 nel Somerset, England, sua padre, Sir Nicholas Barber, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Lady Catherine de Thiesselin, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato John Buckler II circa 1500, nel Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1540, nel Radipole, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Barberが1480年にイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父Sir Nicholas Barberは20歳，母Lady Catherine de Thiesselinは20歳であった。約1500年にイギリスイギリスドールセトでJohn Buckler IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1540年にイギリスイギリスドールセトラディプオルで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Barber(이)가 1480년 영국 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Nicholas Barber(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Catherine de Thiesselin(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에서 John Buckler II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1540년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 라디포일에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Barber nasceu em 1480, em Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Nicholas Barber, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Lady Catherine de Thiesselin, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com John Buckler II aproximadamente 1500, em Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1540, em Radipole, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Barber родилась в 1480 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Nicholas Barber было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Catherine de Thiesselin, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Buckler II около 1500 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1540 г. в местности радипол, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Barber nació en 1480, en Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Nicholas Barber, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Lady Catherine de Thiesselin, tenía 20 años. Se casó con John Buckler II aproximadamente 1500, en Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1540, en Radipole, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años.
